Off Calendar Apr-04-2018 Continued To May-02-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Bresler via Court Call

Mr. Bresler requested a one month continuance, stating that the Administrator is in China, and the bond is in transit. The Status of filing additional $20,000.00 bond is continued to May 2, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
